Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Apr-26-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Carolyn Tsai of Office of the Attorney General telephone number 415-703-5590 for all Defendants.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE UNIVERSITY, LESLIE E. WONG AND DOUGLASS W. BAILEY'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings on all causes of action in the first amended complaint is granted without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2016 Continued To Apr-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Ofmotion And Motion To Strike All Portions, Separate And Inclusive, Of Defts Answer
Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF METTE FORDAN'S Motion To Strike All Portions, Separate And Inclusive, Of Defendant's Answer is denied. The general denial and the affirmative defenses in defendants' answer are adequately pled. Plaintiff appears to make three arguments, all of which lack merit. Plaintiff's argument that the answer contains irrelevant matters is wrong. The answer conforms to the standard format and includes permissible defenses. A motion to strike is not the appropriate procedure for plaintiff's argument that some or all of the affirmative defenses lack merit. Plaintiff's argument that some or all of the affirmative defenses are conclusory is best addressed by plaintiff serving discovery addressed to those defenses. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)

Mtn To Strike All Portions
Off Calendar Feb-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF METTE FORDAN'S Motion To Strike All Portions is off calendar. Plaintiff may refile motion. Plaintiff must give Defendants notice and give Defendants an opportunity to respond pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 1005. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2015 Continued To Jan-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - METTER J. FORDAN, TEL. NO. 1-510-793-1870, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS DR. LESLIE E. WONG, DR. DOUGLASS W. BAILEY and BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE California STATE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with thirty days leave to amend as to all three causes of action alleged by plaintiff. As currently drafted, all three claims suffer from numerous deficiencies including failure to allege compliance with the government claims requirements or why non-compliance is not fatal to the claims and failure to clearly and plainly allege one or more non-discretionary constitutional, statutory or common laws obligations imposed on defendants that were violated by one or more of the defendants or for which one or more of the defendants are vicariously liable. Plaintiff is given an opportunity to remedy this deficiencies if she can do so in good faith. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Miles R. Lendway, CSR # 13684 =302/hk

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Continued To Oct-30-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS DR. LESLIE E. WONG, DR. DOUGLASS W. BAILEY and BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CLAIFORNIA STATE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - Judge Goldsmith is challenged in this case. Per order of the Presiding Judge, the demurrer is continued to 10/30/15 to be heard in the law and motion department at 9:30 a.m. because Judge Kahn will be hearing the calendar on that date. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-26-2015 Off Calendar
